heroSubtitle: I automate business, build smart bots, and modern web apps.
heroQuote: "Choose a job you love, and you will never have to work a day in your life" — Confucius
heroBody: I do not just write code. I build systems that work for people. I automate business workflows, design intelligent bots, and develop modern web applications so you can focus on what truly matters.
ctaTitle: Ready to discuss your task and budget?
ctaSubtitle: I will share 2-3 practical solution options and realistic launch timing the same day.
ctaStep2: Plan and estimate: architecture, stages, timeline
ctaStep3: MVP launch: fast delivery with measurable impact
ctaFooterNote: © 2026. Focused on outcomes, transparency, and delivery speed.
terminalInitial: 👋 This is an interactive terminal: it includes commands, mini-games, and quick info. Type 'help' to see what you can do.
terminalHelpDetailed:
Available commands:
- help: shows all commands and what each one does
- skills: displays my tech stack and core skills
- contact: shows ways to contact me
- about: short intro about me and my specialization
- experience: quick overview of my background and focus areas
- projects: opens the projects section
- wordle: starts the word guessing game (with language choice)
- guess: starts the number guessing game (1-100)
- rps: starts rock-paper-scissors
- clear: clears the terminal screen
- exit: collapses the terminal back
terminalDeferredHint: The terminal is loaded on demand to speed up initial page load. Press the button below to open commands and games.

Salary.title: The Price of Intelligence
Salary.subtitle: Flexible cooperation models

freelance.ideal: Ideal for features, fixes, and consultation

projectBased.desc: Fixed scope, fixed price, predictable budget

guess.title: NUMBER GUESSING GAME
guess.subtitle: Guess the number (1-100)
guess.win: 🎉 Correct! You got it in {attempts} attempts!
guess.lose: 😔 Out of attempts! The number was {number}
guess.invalidInput: Please enter a number between 1 and 100

rps.title: ROCK PAPER SCISSORS
rps.invalidChoice: Invalid choice. Choose rock, paper, or scissors

common.help: Available commands: help, skills, contact, about, experience, projects, wordle, guess, rps, clear
